name: waypoint
description: Install, inspect, and guide lightweight docs-first repository waypoints.

interface.shortDescription: Install and inspect docs-first repo recovery harnesses
interface.longDescription: Waypoint creates a lightweight AGENTS.md plus visible docs harness for greenfield repositories, audits brownfield repositories without writing, runs documentation bloat and decision-consolidation dry-runs, runs a deep multi-perspective docs consistency sweep with read-only lens subagents and a post-cleanup over-deletion check, optionally guides docs/tracks.md active work tracks, and runs deterministic doctor checks for document routing, marker blocks, configured document homes, and broken local Markdown links.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a Waypoint docs harness here
Run Waypoint doctor on this repo
Run a deep docs consistency sweep
Find oversized docs and consolidation candidates
